confidentialite_subtitle: How we protect your data on the {{app_name}} platform
introduction_content_1: Welcome to the {{app_name}} platform. We are committed to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we use it. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and share your data when you use our service.
introduction_content_2: By using our platform, you accept the practices described in this policy. We recommend that you read it carefully to understand our commitments to your privacy.
info_collected_list: Profile information (first name, last name, photo)
data_usage_list: Inform you about events and opportunities
Analyze usage to improve the platform
Ensure the security of your account
data_sharing_text: We never sell your personal information. Your data can be shared only in the following cases:
data_sharing_list: With other users according to your privacy settings
With service providers under strict confidentiality
If required by law or to protect our rights
data_security_text: We take the security of your data very seriously and implement appropriate technical and organizational measures:
user_rights_intro: As a user of our platform, you have certain rights regarding your personal data:

user_rights_list.access: Access: You can access your personal data at any time.
user_rights_list.rectification: Rectification: You can correct your inaccurate information.
user_rights_list.deletion: Deletion: You can request the deletion of your data.
user_rights_list.restriction: Limitation: You can limit the processing of your data.

user_rights_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us via the "Contact" section of the platform or by email at
cookies_text: Our platform uses cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, analyze usage, and personalize content. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
cookies_types_text: Essential cookies for site functionality, analytical cookies to understand usage, and functionality cookies to improve the experience.
policy_changes_text: We may modify this privacy policy from time to time. The most recent version will always be available on this page with the date of the last update. We encourage you to regularly review this policy to stay informed. Significant changes may also be notified by email or via a message on the platform.
contact_text: If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy or our data practices, please don't hesitate to contact us:

delete_account_warning: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.
delete_account_data_warning: This will also remove all your posts, comments, and other data associated with your account.

conditions.title: Terms and Conditions
conditions.subtitle: Rules and procedures governing the use of the {{appName}} platform

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.welcome: Welcome to the {{appName}} platform. These Terms and Conditions (T&C) govern your use of our platform, including all associated features and services.
introduction.agreement: By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our platform.

platform.definition: Refers to the website and services of the {{appName}} community.

user.definition: Any person who accesses or uses the Platform.

account.definition: The personal space created by the User on the Platform.

content.definition: Texts, images, videos, and other data published by Users.

services.definition: All features offered on the Platform.

registration.title: Registration and Account
registration.intro: To fully use our platform, you must create an account. By creating an account, you agree to:

rules.accurate: Provide accurate, up-to-date, and complete information.
rules.confidentiality: Maintain the confidentiality of your password and be responsible for all activities under your account.
rules.singleAccount: Not create multiple accounts or an account in the name of another person.
rules.affiliation: Be a former student, teacher, or administrative staff of OFPPT.

registration.suspension: We reserve the right to suspend or delete your account if we have reason to believe these conditions are not being met.

content.title: Content and Behavior
content.intro: As a user of our platform, you are responsible for the content you publish. You agree not to:

rules.illegal: Post illegal, defamatory, obscene, offensive, or threatening content.
rules.harassment: Harass, intimidate, or discriminate against other users.
rules.privacy: Publish private information about others without their consent.
rules.spam: Use the platform to send unsolicited messages or spam.
rules.malware: Transmit viruses or other malicious code.

content.enforcement: We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these conditions and to suspend or terminate the access of users concerned to the platform.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.protection: The platform and its original content (including logos, graphics, texts) are protected by intellectual property rights.

userContent.label: Regarding your content:
userContent.license: By posting content on the platform, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, and display this content as part of our services.

intellectual.warranty: You warrant that you own all necessary rights to publish the content you share and that this content does not violate the rights of third parties.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.disclaimer: The platform is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind, express or implied.

limits.availability: The platform will be available uninterrupted or error-free.
limits.security: The platform or its servers will be free of viruses or other harmful components.

liability.damages: To the extent permitted by law, we will not be liable for indirect, special, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the platform.

modifications.title: Modifications to the Terms
modifications.right: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications come into effect as soon as they are published on the platform.
modifications.notice: We will inform you of significant changes via a notice on the platform or by email. Your continued use of the platform after the publication of the modifications constitutes your acceptance of these modifications.

tip.label: Tip:
tip.content: We encourage you to regularly check this page to stay informed of updates.

law.title: Applicable Law
law.applicable: These terms are governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of {{country}}. Any dispute relating to these terms or your use of the platform will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Casablanca, {{country}}.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: If you have any questions regarding these terms of use, please contact us:

agreement.title: Usage Agreement
agreement.content: By using our platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and accepted these Terms and Conditions. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our platform.

cookies_page.title: Cookies Policy
cookies_page.subtitle: How we use cookies on the {{appName}} platform

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.welcome: Welcome to the {{appName}} platform cookies policy. This document explains how we use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our platform.
introduction.disclaimer: By continuing to browse our platform, you accept our use of cookies in accordance with this policy. If you do not accept our use of cookies, please adjust your browser settings accordingly or do not use our platform.

whatIs.title: What is a Cookie?
whatIs.description1: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used to make websites work or to make them more efficient, as well as to provide information to the site owners.
whatIs.description2: Cookies allow a website to recognize your device and remember information about your visit, such as your language preferences, login information, and other settings. This can make your next visit easier and make the site more useful to you by personalizing its content.

types.title: Types of Cookies
types.description: We use different types of cookies on our platform:

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the functioning of our platform. They allow you to navigate the site and use its features, such as accessing secure areas.
essential.example: Session cookies to manage your login
essential.duration: Usually deleted when you close your browser

preferences.title: Preference Cookies
preferences.description: These cookies allow our platform to remember your choices and preferences to personalize your experience.

usage.title: How We Use Cookies
usage.description: We use cookies for various reasons, including to:
usage.reason1: Ensure the proper functioning of our platform
usage.reason4: Analyze how our platform is used in order to improve it
usage.reason5: Personalize content and offers based on your interests

management.title: Managing Cookies
management.description: Most web browsers allow you to control most cookies through their settings. You can generally:
management.option1: See which cookies are stored on your device
management.option2: Delete individual cookies or all cookies
management.option3: Block or allow cookies by default
management.browsers: Here's how to manage cookies in the most common browsers:
management.chrome: Go to 'Settings' > 'Privacy and security' > 'Cookies and other site data'
management.firefox: Go to 'Options' > 'Privacy & Security' > 'Cookies and Site Data'
management.edge: Go to 'Settings' > 'Privacy, search, and services' > 'Clear browsing data'

warning.title: Important note
warning.description: Please note that restricting cookies may prevent you from using certain features of our platform. If you choose to disable cookies, some parts of our site may not work properly.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.description1: We reserve the right to modify this cookie policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with a revised update date.
changes.description2: If we make significant changes to this policy, we will notify you via a visible notice on our platform or by email.

advice.title: Tip
advice.description: We encourage you to check this policy regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions regarding our use of cookies, please contact us:
